description_long: This is a tall, rectangular wooden shelving unit with a rustic, weathered finish, likely made from stained or treated planks. The front features two large open compartments, each divided vertically and horizontally, providing four main storage sections. There are visible hooks or pegs in the upper middle section, suggesting it can be used for hanging items such as coats or bags. The base is solid and slightly protrudes, offering additional stability and possibly a small bench or shoe storage area. The sides are plain and flat, emphasizing the utilitarian design, while the back is fully enclosed. This piece is suitable for use in urban environments such as entryways, mudrooms, garages, or communal spaces for organizing personal belongings.
description: A tall, rustic wooden shelving unit with open compartments and hooks, ideal for organizing items in urban entryways or communal spaces.
description_view_0: The front view shows the full face of the shelving unit, with four open compartments and visible hooks in the upper middle section.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the depth of the unit and the solid, flat side panel with no visible features.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the open compartments and the internal dividers, as well as the hooks and the solid base.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the depth and plain side panel of the unit.
